chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-220 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. 18-03-2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Buriro, Advocate for the petitioners. M/s Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G and Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Assistant P.G a/w Inspector Muslim Shaikh, SHO, P.S, B-section and SIP/I.O Abdul Rehman of P.S, Sachal Inv. Karachi. ***** Statements filed by respondents No.3&4 and SSP, Khairpur are taken on record and copies whereof are supplied to counsel for petitioners. Mst. Rubeena Brohi (petitioner No.1) is produced from Darul Aman. I.O is present and submits that statement of the petitioner No.1 under section 164 CrPC was recorded before concerned Magistrate, wherein she has not supported the case of complainant. He further submits that he is going to file report by cancelling the FIR under C- class. After such statement of the I.O, counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of the petition and release of petitioner No.1 from Darul Aman as I.O is going to submit report by cancelling the FIR under C-class with further prayer that directions may be issued for protection. Since I.O after conclusion of investigation is going to submit report by cancelling the FIR under C-class; therefore, he is directed to 2 file such report before the concerned Magistrate within 15 days, as suggested by him. At this juncture, counsel for petitioners submits that petitioner No.1 was admitted to Darul Aman by District & Sessions Judge, Khairpur vide order dated 06.02.2025. Thereafter application for release of petitioner No.1 was filed which was declined by order dated 10.02.2025.

At this juncture, counsel for petitioners submits that petitioner No.1 was admitted to Darul Aman by District & Sessions Judge, Khairpur vide order dated 06.02.2025. Thereafter application for release of petitioner No.1 was filed which was declined by order dated 10.02.2025. Counsel for petitioners submits that since I.O is going to file report canceling the FIR under C-class; therefore, petitioner No.1 may be set at liberty. Petitioner No.1 is present and submits that she has apprehension from her parents and she wishes to go with her husband Zameer Ali (petitioner No.2) who is present in Court. Incharge Darul Aman is directed to release petitioner No.1 along with her husband after obtaining personal bond in the sum of Rs.500,000/-. Official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. The petition along with listed application(s), if any, is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
